title: Executive Order 8304—Revocation of Executive Order No. 2552 of March 21, 1917, Withdrawing Public Lands for Lighthouse Purposes
text:
ALASKA
By virtue of the authority vested in me by the act of June 25, 1910, ch. 421, 36 Stat. 847, Executive Order No. 2552 of March 21, 1917, withdrawing public land in Alaska for lighthouse purposes, is hereby revoked.
FRANKLIN D ROOSEVELT
The White House,
December 19, 1939.
